title: Painting with Rusty Shanks
description: Learn to paint landscapes with artist Rusty Shanks.
quote: Last week, I taught you how to paint shrubbery using your own head as a brush.
altHero: Rusty Shanks, a curly haired man, in front of a canvas and easel
alt2: Rusty dabs some orange on a canvas with a paintbrush
alt3: landscape painting of a house by a river
alt4: an artist man talks with Rusty who looks concerned
